sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me click the remaining greens one by one and check for level completion
# Green 3: rows 18-21, cols 35-38, center (19.5, 36.5)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 36}])
print(f"Click green 3: gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('g', 'G'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Green 4: rows 24-27, cols 41-44, center (25.5, 42.5)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': 42}])
print(f"\nClick green 4: gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('g', 'G'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Green 5: rows 36-39, cols 41-44, center (37.5, 42.5)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 37, 'col': 42}])
print(f"\nClick green 5: gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('g', 'G'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check final state
print(f"\nFinal: done={last_action_result.get('done')}, score={last_action_result.get('score')}")
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Top section ===")
for i in range(17, 23):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][2:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
